CustomField.formula: IF( (Purchase_Request_Approver__c = $User.Id && (ISPICKVAL(Status__c , "For Approval") || ISPICKVAL(Status__c , "For Pricing Approval"))) || ( $Profile.Name = "Purchasing Officer 2.0" && ISPICKVAL(Status__c , "For Item Approval")) , TRUE, FALSE)
CustomField.label: Needs My Approval
